reasoning_content: ResponseWe need to generate the RISCV tablegen headers for task5. Let me run the setup.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && export YatCC_LLVM_DIR=/workspace/YatCC/llvm && bash task5_setup.sh 2>&1 | tail -30

tool_call.name: terminal
